title: Delicate Velvety Norwegian Cod Bake
description: A pescatarian-friendly Norwegian dish featuring fatty and velvety cod, paired with Bramley apples, perfect for a delicious meal prep dinner. This recipe combines the freshness of cod with the sweetness of apples in a harmonious bake.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the melted butter, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced Bramley apples to the bowl and toss to coat with the butter mixture.
In a separate bowl, dust the Norwegian cod fillets with all-purpose flour, shaking off any excess.
Place the cod fillets in a baking dish and top each fillet with a few slices of the apple mixture.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the top of the cod and apples.
Bake the cod in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the cod from the oven and let it rest for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the cod hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
